inputs.label: Stock/Portfolio Average Return
inputs.businessContext: Expected or historical average annual return of the stock or portfolio being analyzed, expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected or historical average annual return of the stock or portfolio being analyzed, expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Analiz edilen hisse senedi veya portföyün beklenen veya geçmiş ortalama yıllık getirisi (yüzde olarak ifade edilir).

inputs.label: Market Average Return
inputs.businessContext: Average annual return of the benchmark market index (e.g., S&P 500), expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average annual return of the benchmark market index (e.g., S&P 500), expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Referans piyasa endeksinin (ör. S&P 500) ortalama yıllık getirisi (yüzde olarak ifade edilir).

inputs.label: Risk-Free Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual return of a risk-free asset (e.g., government bond yield), expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual return of a risk-free asset (e.g., government bond yield), expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Risksiz bir varlığın yıllık getirisi (ör. devlet tahvili faizi), yüzde olarak ifade edilir.

inputs.label: Covariance (Stock, Market)
inputs.businessContext: Covariance between the stock/portfolio returns and market returns, typically computed from historical data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Covariance between the stock/portfolio returns and market returns, typically computed from historical data.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hisse senedi/portföy getirileri ile piyasa getirileri arasındaki kovaryans, genellikle geçmiş verilerden hesaplanır.

inputs.label: Variance of Market Returns
inputs.businessContext: Variance of the benchmark market index returns, measuring total risk of the market.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variance of the benchmark market index returns, measuring total risk of the market.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Piyasanın toplam riskini ölçen kıyaslama piyasa endeksi getirilerinin varyansı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
